notes.title: BloodHound Domain Enumeration
checklist: Install BloodHound and Neo4j
Run SharpHound or bloodhound-python collector
Import data into BloodHound
Analyze shortest paths to Domain Admin
Check for Kerberoastable users on DA path
Document all attack paths

notes.title: Kerberoasting Attack
checklist: Confirm a domain user credential is in scope
Request SPN tickets
Crack hashes offline
Validate cracked credential carefully
Map privilege and reuse paths

notes.title: AS-REP Roasting
checklist: Collect candidate usernames
Request AS-REP hashes
Crack hashes offline
Test credentials only inside scope

notes.title: Network Service Scan
checklist: Confirm target is in scope
Run TCP service scan
Run full port sweep if allowed
Create service notes and follow-up links

notes.title: SQL Injection Testing
checklist: Confirm testing window and authorization
Capture request and identify parameter
Run low-risk validation first
Document impact and exact evidence

notes.title: XSS (Cross-Site Scripting)
checklist: Identify reflected or stored input
Test encoding context
Confirm exploitability with harmless payload
Record browser and account role

notes.title: JWT Configuration Review
checklist: Collect a valid in-scope token
Decode header and claims
Check algorithm and key handling
Test expiration, audience, and issuer validation
Document accepted malformed or expired tokens

notes.title: API Rate Limit Testing
checklist: Confirm rate-limit testing is permitted
Identify login, OTP, reset, or expensive endpoints
Measure baseline response codes and lockout behavior
Test account, IP, token, and endpoint level limits
Record request count, time window, and impact

notes.title: GraphQL Introspection Review
checklist: Confirm GraphQL endpoint is in scope
Check whether introspection is enabled
Export schema for offline review
Identify sensitive queries and mutations
Link risky operations to authorization tests

notes.title: BOLA / IDOR Testing
checklist: Create or obtain two different in-scope users
Capture object ids from normal traffic
Replay requests with another user's token
Test read, update, delete, and export endpoints
Document object owner, acting user, and impact

notes.title: APK Static Analysis
checklist: Confirm app build and package name
Decompile APK resources and code
Search for secrets and endpoints
Review manifest permissions and exported components
Link findings to dynamic testing notes

notes.title: Deep Link Testing
checklist: Extract schemes, hosts, and paths
Launch each deep link with controlled parameters
Check authentication and authorization gates
Test unsafe redirects or token leakage
Document activity, URI, and expected role

notes.title: Frida Runtime Hooking
checklist: Confirm device and app build are in scope
Start Frida server or gadget
Identify target process and package
Hook sensitive methods safely
Record bypassed control and runtime evidence

notes.title: TLS Pinning Review
commands: adb shell settings put global http_proxy <TARGET_IP>:8080
checklist: Install test CA on the device or emulator
Proxy normal app traffic
Identify pinning implementation
Bypass pinning only inside authorized testing
Document sensitive requests exposed through interception

notes.title: S3 Public Exposure Review
checklist: Confirm account and bucket are in scope
Check public access block settings
Review bucket policy and ACL exposure
Attempt anonymous listing only if permitted
Capture exact bucket, object, and policy evidence

notes.title: IAM Privilege Review
checklist: Identify current principal
Collect attached and inline policies
Check assume role paths
Simulate sensitive permissions
Document blast radius and least-privilege fix

notes.title: Azure Blob Exposure Review
commands: az storage blob list --account-name <ACCOUNT> --container-name <CONTAINER> --auth-mode login -o table
checklist: Confirm tenant, subscription, account, and container are in scope
Check container public access level
List blobs with authenticated context
Test anonymous access only when allowed
Document container, blob path, and exposure type

notes.title: Cloud Metadata Service Review
checklist: Confirm metadata testing is explicitly authorized
Identify cloud provider and workload context
Check whether metadata requires defensive headers or tokens
Avoid extracting secrets unless scope permits it
Document reachable endpoint, control gap, and mitigation

notes.title: LDAP Domain Reconnaissance
checklist: Confirm LDAP services are in scope
Collect naming contexts and domain metadata
Check anonymous bind behavior
Record domain controllers and LDAP ports
Send useful context to enumeration notes

notes.title: Password Spraying Checks
checklist: Get explicit approval for password spraying
Confirm lockout threshold and observation window
Use one low-risk password per window
Stop immediately if lockouts appear
Document successful accounts and control gaps

notes.title: DCSync Permission Review
checklist: Confirm post-exploitation credential testing is in scope
Identify principals with replication privileges
Avoid dumping secrets unless explicitly approved
Validate whether privilege is direct or inherited
Document privilege path and remediation

notes.title: SMB Enumeration
checklist: Confirm SMB host is in scope
Try anonymous share listing
Test scoped credentials when available
Identify writable shares and sensitive files
Link exposed credentials to follow-up notes

notes.title: DNS Enumeration
checklist: Identify authoritative DNS servers
Test zone transfer only against scoped servers
Check recursion exposure
Collect hostnames for service scans
Document records that reveal internal topology

notes.title: SNMP Enumeration
checklist: Confirm UDP testing is allowed
Check common community strings
Walk safe OIDs for system and interface data
Look for hostnames, routes, users, and services
Avoid write tests unless explicitly authorized

notes.title: Network Evidence Reporting
checklist: Preserve scan outputs and timestamps
Capture proof without exposing unnecessary secrets
Write affected asset, impact, and reproduction steps
Add remediation and retest notes
Hash important evidence files

notes.title: Content Discovery
checklist: Confirm target URL and scope boundaries
Collect robots.txt and sitemap hints
Run content discovery with rate limits
Review interesting status codes manually
Link discovered endpoints to testing notes

notes.title: Authentication Testing
checklist: Map login, logout, reset, and registration flows
Inspect session cookie flags and lifetime
Test lockout and rate limiting with permission
Check role transitions and forced browsing
Document exact account state and evidence

notes.title: File Upload Testing
checklist: Confirm upload endpoint and allowed file types
Test extension, MIME, magic bytes, and size controls
Check where files are stored and served
Avoid active payloads unless explicitly authorized
Document validation bypass and impact

notes.title: SSRF Testing
checklist: Identify URL-fetching parameters or integrations
Use a controlled callback host first
Test loopback and metadata only when authorized
Check redirect and DNS rebinding behavior carefully
Record request origin, destination, and response evidence

notes.title: CSRF Testing
checklist: Identify state-changing requests
Check CSRF token presence and validation
Review SameSite cookie behavior
Test Origin and Referer enforcement
Document user action required and impact

notes.title: Group Policy Preference Passwords
checklist: Confirm SYSVOL access is in scope
Search policy XML for cpassword values
Validate whether exposed accounts still exist
Avoid broad password reuse without approval
Document file path and affected account

notes.title: LAPS Permission Review
checklist: Confirm LAPS testing is authorized
Identify computers managed by LAPS
Review who can read local admin passwords
Test read access with least exposure
Recommend reducing delegated read rights

notes.title: NTLM Relay Checks
checklist: Confirm relay and coercion testing is in scope
Identify hosts without required SMB signing
Choose safe relay targets
Avoid disruptive coercion methods unless approved
Document signing state and relay impact

notes.title: SSL/TLS Service Review
checklist: Identify TLS-enabled services
Capture certificate chain and hostname mismatch
Check weak protocols and ciphers
Review expiry and trust issues
Document remediation by service owner

notes.title: NFS Enumeration
checklist: Confirm NFS hosts are in scope
List exported paths
Mount read-only when possible
Check no_root_squash and sensitive files
Document export path and access level

notes.title: VPN Exposure Review
checklist: Identify internet-facing VPN portals
Fingerprint product and version carefully
Check MFA and lockout expectations
Review certificate and exposed banners
Escalate outdated versions to patch validation

notes.title: Security Headers Review
checklist: Collect response headers from key pages
Review CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, and cookie flags
Check header consistency across redirects
Avoid treating missing headers as critical without impact
Document practical exploit path where possible

notes.title: Clickjacking Testing
checklist: Identify sensitive authenticated actions
Check X-Frame-Options and frame-ancestors
Build harmless frame proof of concept
Assess whether user action can cause impact
Document browser and affected workflow

notes.title: Web Cache Poisoning
checklist: Confirm cache testing is authorized
Identify cache keys and unkeyed inputs
Use harmless reflected markers
Avoid poisoning shared production caches
Document cache hit behavior and affected users

notes.title: Server-Side Template Injection
checklist: Identify reflected template-like inputs
Start with arithmetic probes
Fingerprint engine only with safe payloads
Avoid command execution unless explicitly authorized
Document engine, input, and impact

notes.title: OpenAPI Specification Review
checklist: Locate OpenAPI or Swagger documents
Identify undocumented admin endpoints
Review auth requirements by path
Generate endpoint checklist for testing
Link risky paths to authorization notes

notes.title: Mass Assignment Testing
checklist: Compare request body with response object
Identify server-managed fields
Attempt harmless unauthorized field changes
Check create and update endpoints
Document accepted field and privilege impact

references.label: OWASP API3 Broken Object Property Level Authorization

notes.title: CORS Configuration Review
checklist: Test authenticated and unauthenticated endpoints
Check reflected origins and wildcard credentials
Review preflight behavior
Confirm whether sensitive data is browser-readable
Document exploitability with cookie/session context

notes.title: Backup and Debug Flag Review
checklist: Decode the Android manifest
Check debuggable and backup flags
Review backup rules and exclusions
Validate risk on the provided build type
Document sensitive data recoverability

notes.title: Local Storage Review
commands: adb shell run-as <PACKAGE> ls -la files shared_prefs databases
checklist: Confirm app data extraction is allowed
Check shared preferences and databases
Look for tokens, PII, and cached secrets
Validate encryption and key storage
Document file path and data sensitivity

notes.title: iOS Plist and Entitlement Review
checklist: Unpack IPA in a clean workspace
Review URL schemes and transport security
Inspect entitlements and keychain groups
Identify risky permissions or debug settings
Link schemes to deep-link testing

notes.title: Security Group Exposure Review
checklist: Confirm account and region are in scope
Find public ingress to sensitive ports
Map rules to attached resources
Check IPv4 and IPv6 exposure
Recommend least-privilege ingress

notes.title: Kubernetes RBAC Review
checklist: Confirm cluster context and namespace are in scope
List effective permissions
Review bindings to broad roles
Check pod exec, secret read, and workload creation rights
Document escalation path and namespace boundary

notes.title: Container Image Review
checklist: Confirm image and registry are in scope
Scan for vulnerabilities and secrets
Review image history and layers
Check default user and entrypoint
Document exploitable package or secret evidence

notes.title: GCP IAM Review
checklist: Confirm project and identity are in scope
List project IAM bindings
Identify owner/editor and service account key risks
Check impersonation permissions
Document privilege path and least-privilege fix
